texts: We build the present … and draw the features of tomorrow

With more than 20 years of experience in the Saudi market, Lamat Elarabia has established itself as a leading contracting company that combines deep-rooted experience with a modern vision. Our team includes more than 150 qualified professionals who form the cornerstone of the company's successes and consecutive achievements. The company has a strong track record of delivering major government and private projects, with strict commitment to quality and safety standards at every stage of work. Under one roof, Lamat Elarabia provides integrated solutions covering client needs from design to execution, ensuring results that exceed expectations and keep pace with the Kingdom's development ambitions.
Over the years, Lamat Elarabia has participated in delivering numerous government and private projects across the Kingdom
Al-Ferdous Residential Project - in cooperation with the General Contracting Company (2023-2024).
Modern finishing projects (hotels, retail stores, beauty centers).
Electrical, plumbing, HVAC and civil defense projects (schools, factories, event halls)
Abdullah Al-Fallaj Real Estate Development Company

At Lamat Elarabia Contracting, we look to the future with ambition and a drive for leadership. We strive to be among the most prominent contracting companies in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia and an active partner in the nation's development and construction journey under Saudi Vision 2030

We believe construction is not merely a building process, but the making of a future and the shaping of cities' identities. That is why we deliver integrated solutions that combine quality, innovation and sustainability in every project we undertake

Our vision focuses on redefining modern contracting by merging deep engineering expertise with advanced technologies, creating projects that express the authenticity of Saudi craftsmanship and keep pace with rapid urban development

We continuously strive to raise performance efficiency and expand our services to cover distinguished residential, commercial and government projects, delivered to the highest global safety and quality standards, making Lamat Elarabia a symbol of trust and mastery in the world of construction

At Lamat Elarabia Contracting, we provide integrated solutions covering general contracting, maintenance and information technology, making us the partner that combines construction, development and modern technology
General Contracting: government and private construction - finishing and decor - electromechanical works
Technical Services: electrical - plumbing - HVAC systems - civil defense and safety - reinforced concrete and infrastructure works
Commercial Supply: supply and sale of building and finishing materials - cleaning and care materials and tools

Lamat Elarabia Contracting is proud to have received several certificates and letters of appreciation from government and private entities, in recognition of its commitment to high quality, precision in execution, and professionalism in project management.  These certificates are clear proof of our clients' trust in our integrated construction services, and of our continuous commitment to applying the highest technical and engineering standards in every project.  These achievements motivate us to keep developing and to strengthen Lamat Elarabia's position as a reliable partner in construction projects across the Kingdom.

texts: Building the present ... and shaping tomorrow

At Lamat Elarabia Contracting, we provide integrated solutions covering general contracting, maintenance and information technology, making us the partner that combines construction, development and modern technology
The latest news on new projects and contracts
Specialized articles on construction and development
Market analyses on the future of contracting in the Kingdom
Quality standards in the contracting sector
Why do they make the difference in project success?

Quality is no longer a luxury in the contracting world; it has become a necessity for project success. Applying quality standards at every stage - from material selection to execution - reduces errors and waste and strengthens client trust. At Lamat Elarabia, we adhere to the highest international quality standards to deliver projects that exceed our clients' expectations
The latest construction trends in Saudi Arabia

Quality is no longer a luxury in the contracting world; it has become a necessity for project success. Applying quality standards at every stage - from material selection to execution - reduces errors and waste and strengthens client trust. At Lamat Elarabia, we adhere to the highest international quality standards to deliver projects that exceed our clients' expectations
the protection of work crews and sites?

Safety on construction sites is the cornerstone of any successful project. Providing personal protective equipment, applying strict safety systems, and continuously training crews reduces accidents and ensures a safe working environment. At Lamat Elarabia, safety is a core value we uphold across all our projects

texts: At Lamat Elarabia, we believe our true success begins with our team; it is the foundation on which our achievements are built. We are keen to attract the best talents and expertise across disciplines, and we continuously develop our employees' skills through training programs and professional practices that keep pace with the latest market standards. With this vision, we build a work environment that stimulates creativity and excellence and guarantees the highest levels of performance in every project we undertake.
Training programs: training and qualification for young people in contracting and technical services.
